resources.string: Privacy-first wallet and messenger on Beam
Create a new wallet or restore an existing one
Create a password to secure your wallet
Write down your seed phrase on paper and keep it in a safe place
Do not let anyone see your seed phrase
Never type your seed phrase into password managers or cloud storage
Keep the copies of your seed phrase in a safe place
To ensure the seed phrase is written down correctly, please enter the requested words
Type in or paste your 12-word seed phrase
Write these 12 words down and store them safely. This is the ONLY way to recover your wallet. Never share them with anyone.

This seed phrase can only be used on one device at a time. Running the same seed on multiple devices will cause transaction conflicts. To monitor your wallet from another device, use your owner key with your own node.
To confirm you saved your seed phrase, enter the following words:
Enter your 12-word seed phrase. Type each word — suggestions will appear.
Choose a password to protect your wallet on this device.
Password must be at least 6 characters
Invalid node address. Use hostname:port with valid port (1-65535)
One or more words are incorrect. Please check your seed phrase.
Failed to restore wallet. Check your seed phrase.
Wallet on the Beam Privacy Blockchain
Too many attempts. Try again in %1$ds
Mobile syncing %1$d%% · Online via remote node
Guarantees maximum anonymity set of up to 64K.
Make sure the address is correct — offline transactions cannot be refunded.
Default address. Sender can pay online or offline.
Classic short address. Both wallets must be open simultaneously.
Maximum anonymity. Sender does not need to be online.
Sender can pay online or offline. Both transaction types supported.
Connected to remote node. Only regular and SBBS addresses available.
Fallback mode — using remote node. Limited address types.
Confirm your wallet password to send
SBBS transaction — recipient must be online within 12 hours or the transaction will expire.
Transactions cannot be reversed once confirmed.
This will export all transaction history as a ZIP file containing:
The ZIP will be saved to your Downloads folder.
There are no sent transactions yet.
There are no received transactions yet.
There are no in progress transactions yet.
The transaction will be deleted. This operation can not be undone.
calculated with the exchange rate at the time of the transaction
exchange rate was not available at the time of the transaction
Payment proof not available for this transaction.
There is an active transaction that uses this address. Are you sure?
This address was generated by a newer Beam library version. Please update your wallet.
This address was generated by a newer Beam client version. Please update your wallet.
Address details with max anonymity set
Regular address includes both online and offline addresses.
SBBS Address (use for CEX withdrawals and mining)
Are you sure you want to cancel your offer?
There are no active offers at the moment
There are no swap transactions yet.
%1$s is not connected. Please check your settings.
You cannot accept your own offer
Insufficient funds to complete the swap
The swap amount must be greater than the transaction fee
You can\'t create an offer with identical assets on both sides
Confirm your wallet password to swap
Fee: 0.001 BEAM (paid by the person who accepts your offer)
You don\'t have any applications installed yet
Sorry, the installation failed. Please check the file and try again.
Are you sure you want to uninstall %1$s DApp?
Something went wrong. Uninstall failed. Please try again.
This DApp requires version %1$s of Beam Wallet or higher.
Browse the DApp Store to install decentralized apps
Browse and install DApps from the Beam on-chain registry
Pull down to refresh or sideload a .dapp package
DApp installed. Go back to open it.
Sideload a .dapp package from your device
Enable or disable publishers to filter their DApps
Password verification is required to change this setting
Random node address and port will be displayed after connecting.
Swap in progress, cannot disconnect node
Received coins can be spent immediately.
Longest transaction time for maximum anonymity
Allow access to Beam Messenger and DApps
New password cannot be the same as old
New password doesn\'t match the confirm password
Please notice, that knowing your owner key gives full control over your wallet funds.
Get Beams from Beam Community Faucet
Rescan will sync transaction and UTXO data from the blockchain. This may take some time. Are you sure?
Are you sure you want to remove this wallet? All local data will be deleted. Make sure you have your seed phrase backed up.
1. Save wallet logs using the button below
2. Send an email to %1$s or open a ticket on %2$s
3. Don\'t forget to attach the log files.
File too large (max %1$sKB). Only images are compressed.
Leave this group and delete all messages? You can rejoin later.
Delete this entire conversation? New messages from this contact will start a fresh chat.
Invalid handle. Use letters, numbers, and underscores (3–30 characters).
Your handle is being registered on the Beam blockchain. This usually takes about 1 minute.
Choose a unique handle for encrypted messaging on Beam
Handle must be at least 3 characters
Delete conversation? This cannot be undone.
Tap the pencil to start a chat
Leave \"%1$s\"? You\'ll need an invite to rejoin.
Your messaging address is being updated on the Beam blockchain. This usually takes about 1 minute.
Your wallet was restored on a new device. Your messaging address needs to be updated so others can reach you.
Register a handle to start messaging
Your @handle is safe on-chain. Previous conversations cannot be restored as messages are stored locally. A small fee applies.
You need BEAM to pay the transaction fee.
Are you sure you want to delete this group? This action cannot be undone.
Are you sure you want to leave this group?
Microphone permission is needed to record voice messages
Voice message too large (%1$dKB). Max is %2$dKB.
Cannot decode the proof. Invalid format.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
System time not synchronized. Please check your device time settings.
Failed to access wallet data. Please check your storage permissions.
No seed phrase found. Please restore your wallet.
Failed to sync with the blockchain. Please check your connection.
Application version mismatch. Please update the app.
Split a large UTXO into smaller coins for better privacy and spendability.
Point your camera at a QR code
Camera permission is needed to scan QR codes
Create a new SBBS address and update it on-chain
Unregister @%1$s and free it for others
This will unregister @%1$s from the blockchain. Your conversations will be lost and the handle will be available for others to claim.
Not registered. Register a @handle in the Chats tab to use messaging.
Notify when a new app version is available
Receive notifications when transaction status changes
Keep wallet connected for instant message delivery
App usable via remote node while syncing
Mobile Node runs a lightweight FlyClient node on your device for maximum privacy. Your wallet verifies the blockchain independently without trusting any remote server.
First sync may take several minutes
Uses more battery and mobile data
Send/receive and messaging work during sync
DApp and contract features are limited until sync completes
Your wallet stays connected to a remote node while the mobile node syncs. Once synced, all traffic switches to your local node automatically.
Ask for password on every Send
Require password confirmation for each transaction
Enter your wallet password to disable this security setting.
No biometric hardware found on this device
Wallet requires password on every app launch
This device does not support biometric authentication
Wallet password not found. Please try again.
Scan your fingerprint to enable biometric unlock
Maximum time funds are locked in Max Privacy transactions.
Password must be at least 6 characters
Save wallet backup JSON to Downloads
View, edit, and generate wallet addresses
Re-sync all transactions from the chain
This will permanently delete your wallet from this device. Make sure you have backed up your seed phrase!
Import wallet data from \"%1$s\"?\n\nThis will merge the backup into your current wallet.
TX submitted. Display name will update when confirmed.
TX submitted. Address will update when confirmed.
TX submitted. Handle will be removed when confirmed.
You must transfer ownership or delete %1$d group(s) first
Mobile node enabled — syncing in background
Save ZIP with all TX types to Downloads
SBBS addresses used for online transactions and messaging. For offline/max-privacy receive addresses, use the Receive screen.
No UTXOs yet — waiting for data…
Individual coin records are not generated for Max Privacy
This is how your profile picture will look
Not enough funds to complete this transaction
Confirm your wallet password to approve this transaction
Recipient does not need to be online
Both wallets must be online within 12h
Default address. Sender can pay online or offline.
Classic short address. Both wallets must be open simultaneously.
Maximum anonymity. Sender does not need to be online.
Sender can pay online or offline. Both transaction types supported.
Funds will be locked for a minimum of %1$dh. Longer lock time = stronger privacy. You can change this in Settings.
Funds will be locked indefinitely for maximum privacy. Set a time limit in Settings to control when funds become available.
Connected to remote node — only online transactions are supported. Offline and Max Privacy addresses require your own node.
Connected to public node (own node unreachable) — only online transactions supported
Point camera at a Beam QR code
Create smaller coins to prevent transaction failures
This creates an on-chain transaction. A fee will be deducted from your balance.
Confirm your wallet password to split coins
Your coins are being split. The balance will update shortly.
Search for a @handle to start chatting
Set group icon later in Group Info
Anyone can find and join this group
Only people with an invite can join
Private groups are protected by a password. When you invite someone, the password is shared automatically via encrypted SBBS.
TX submitted. Name will update when confirmed.
TX submitted. @%1$s will be promoted when confirmed.
TX submitted. @%1$s will be demoted when confirmed.
TX submitted. @%1$s will be removed when confirmed.
TX submitted. @%1$s will be banned when confirmed.
TX submitted. @%1$s will be unbanned when confirmed.
No app to open this file
Wallet is syncing — transaction may take longer to process
Transaction submitted. Group will appear when confirmed.
Import failed — invalid or corrupt file
Owner key copied! Clipboard clears in 30s
Promote an admin first before transferring ownership.
Voice message too large (%1$dKB). Max is %2$dKB.
Reply to a message or use: /tip @handle <amount>
Time must be in the future
Delete all messages in this chat? This cannot be undone.
No packs yet. Create one in the sticker tab first.
Pack not saved yet. Ask sender to share it.
You don\'t have this pack. The sender can share it using the Share button in their sticker picker.
Reply to a message, or /tip @handle amount
Leave transaction submitted. Group will be removed once confirmed.
Next message will auto-delete after this time. Does not change the other person\'s settings.
This URL will open in your default browser:
